title: RUSTINS Step & Tile Paint, Red, 1L-– Hard-Wearing Floor Coating for Concrete, Stone & Brick – Durable, Slip-Resistant Finish for Indoor & Outdoor Use – Available in Red & Black
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Durable and Weather-Resistant: Rustins Step and Tile Paint provides long-lasting protection for your steps and tiles, ensuring they remain in excellent condition even under harsh weather conditions.
High Gloss Finish: This paint delivers a stunning high gloss finish that enhances the appearance of your steps and tiles, adding a touch of elegance and style to any surface
Easy Application: Designed for smooth and effortless application with a brush or roller, Rustins Step and Tile Paint offers a uniform, professional finish that is easy to achieve. ADD TO BASKET now.
description: From the manufacturer Quick Dry Step & Tile Rustins Quick Dry Step & Tile Gloss Paint is a quick drying high performance interior and exterior paint for use on tiles, concrete and bricks. Not for use on glazed or quarry tiles. Red available in 250ml, 500ml, 1 litre and 2.5 litres Black available in 250ml, 500ml and 1 litre. Water based Gloss finish Interior & exterior Hard wearing, durable & weather resistant For tiles, concrete and bricks About Us In 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London.
